positive: A majestic, central illustration of celestial flora and fauna; bioluminescent fox spirits curled amongst oversized, stylized jungle leaves and glowing moon orchids. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient cosmic background of deep indigo, sapphire, and ethereal violet. Use a highly contrasted line art style mixed with watercolor wash effects. Focus on clean edges, magical luminescence, and symmetrical balance. Intricate detail suitable for fabric printing, perfect for apparel design.
